related_questions.question: Which consensus mechanism does BTC use?
What are the disadvantages of blockchain consensus?
related_questions.snippet: The disadvantages: Complexity: blockchain technology can be difficult to understand for widespread adoption. Immutability: once data has been added to the blockchain, it is very difficult to modify. This can be an advantage for some uses, but is not always suitable for others.
related_questions.title: FAQ Crypto - What are the advantages and disadvantages of blockchain?

related_questions.question: What consensus mechanism does XRP use?
related_questions.snippet: Unlike proof-of-work or proof-of-stake blockchains, XRP utilizes a unique Proof of Association (PoA) consensus mechanism, in which servers called validators come to an agreement on the order and outcome of transactions every 3-5 seconds.
related_questions.title: XRP Digital Asset for Global Crypto Utility - Ripple

related_questions.question: How does blockchain reach a consensus?
related_questions.snippet: The bitcoin blockchain is replicated on multiple nodes and the nodes order the transactions based on a proof-of-work (PoW) consensus mechanism. To add blocks to the blockchain, each node has to show that it has performed some amount of work also known as proof-of-work (PoW).
related_questions.title: Understanding Blockchain Consensus Models

text_blocks.snippet: A consensus mechanism is a set of programmed rules and protocols that allows a distributed network of independent computers (nodes) to agree on the state of a blockchain. It automates trust, prevents double-spending, and ensures malicious actors cannot manipulate the digital ledger without requiring a central authority.
While there are many variations, networks rely on a few dominant mechanisms to validate transactions:

list.snippet: Proof of Work (PoW): Used by Bitcoin, PoW requires miners to compete in solving energy-intensive mathematical puzzles to validate blocks. This guarantees security through high computational costs but is criticized for slow speeds and massive energy consumption.

text_blocks.snippet: To explore the exact trade-offs of security and decentralization across these systems, you can review the detailed Visa Consensus Mechanisms Guide or dive into the Ethereum Consensus Documentation.
